name: Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the pie filling and crushed pineapple into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking pan.
2. Stir together thoroughly.
3. Sprinkle the cake mix evenly over the top of the fruit mixture.
4. Cut the butter into small pieces and dot them over the cake mix, ensuring they are placed in all corners of the pan.
5. Scatter the chopped pecans on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until the cake is browned.
7. Let cool before refrigerating any leftovers.
